issues.title: Science Weekly
issues.subtitle: Weekly digest for 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-19 covering radar, satellite, numerical weather prediction, and AI-oriented meteorology papers.
issues.subtitleCht: 2026-04-13 至 2026-04-19 的每週摘要，聚焦雷達、衛星、數值天氣預報與 AI 氣象研究文章。
issues.summary: A bilingual weekly issue that separates primary AI papers from forecast-system papers, retains a strong radar lead, and records the lack of a clean same-week satellite feature honestly.
issues.summaryCht: 本期雙語週刊把 AI 主分類與預報系統文章分開處理，保留明確的雷達主文，並誠實記錄同週衛星主題主文的缺口。

issues.title: Science Weekly
issues.subtitle: Weekly digest for 2026-04-06 to 2026-04-12 covering radar, satellite, numerical weather prediction, and abstract-evidenced AI-related papers.
issues.subtitleCht: 2026-04-06 至 2026-04-12 的每週摘要，聚焦雷達、衛星、數值天氣預報，以及可由摘要證實的 AI 相關文章。
issues.summary: A two-pane weekly issue refreshed from the live journal list, now with AI pages and visible secondary-category labels for dual-attribute papers.
issues.summaryCht: 依最新期刊清單重建的雙視窗週刊，新增 AI 頁面，並為跨類文章標示可見的次要分類。

issues.title: Science Weekly
issues.subtitle: Weekly digest for 2026-03-30 to 2026-04-05 covering radar, satellite, numerical weather prediction, and AI-for-weather papers.
issues.subtitleCht: 2026-03-30 至 2026-04-05 的每週摘要，聚焦雷達、衛星、數值天氣預報與 AI 氣象文章。
issues.summary: A refreshed two-pane issue for 2026-03-30 to 2026-04-05 with primary-category placement plus visible secondary labels for dual-attribute papers.
issues.summaryCht: 重整後的雙視窗週報，涵蓋 2026-03-30 至 2026-04-05 期間文章，並為雙重屬性論文加上可見次分類標籤。
